textByHash.dd7079a971d511f509445dbdf055dd6637cac480: Hey leave me alone, can't you see that I'm busy?
textByHash.d28952560cb9002ba90a2b478f336118e7e751ba: Work, work, work, that's all I ever do.
textByHash.f93769913e181991862f5b17a6f3a41c8299f3fb: I feel so weak, I could faint.
textByHash.dac4e8f6fbe8153475ab68678c898acf154cd89b: I'm so tired, I could sleep standing up.
textByHash.0f3f2398378d08a3fe923f237c5f01cba0c867e3: What I wouldn't give for a good night's rest.
textByHash.127e446e60b0887c9522e20929a744ca71cb48ae: I'm rich in experience, poor in wealth.
textByHash.b5e40663e22f657debdc77369ec875f50f89c6b8: I can't think straight I'm so tired.
